target.label: Complete a task (toggle with the payoff)

rationale: Requirement coverage thresholds PASS (P0 100%, P1 100%, overall 89%). Held at CONCERNS by custom project bars + residual risk: Bar A (>=70% code coverage) is UNVERIFIED (no instrumentation, unmeasured); Bar B (>=5 passing Playwright tests) has 12 cases present but passing is unproven on host; plus the testseed integration is unexecuted, the P2 completed-visual payoff is unasserted, and rollback is proven for 5xx only. Clears to PASS once coverage >=70% is measured/met and the E2E+integration suites run green.
